description: You are a freelance commercial photographer who has just leased a loft apartment and needs to present a studio conversion plan to the landlord for build-out approval. Using the provided empty building shell in Sweet Home 3D, convert the space into a fully furnished professional photography studio. Create at least three new partition walls to define distinct zones such as a main shooting bay, a secondary product photography area, an enclosed changing/makeup room, and an equipment storage area. Add at least four text labels to the floor plan identifying these functional zones (e.g., 'Main Shooting Bay', 'Post-Processing Lab', 'Client Lounge', 'Changing Room'). Furnish the studio with appropriate items including desks or tables for editing and product shoots, chairs for a client lounge, equipment storage shelves, and studio lighting. Generate a 3D photo rendering of the completed studio and save it to ~/Desktop/studio_3d_photo.png. Save the modified plan file.
